hero.subtitle: Every piece of sushi at Crimson is a delicate sculpture, where the freshness of the ocean meets the master craftsmanship of our artisans.

story.title: A "Shibui" Space
story.description: Stepping into Crimson Sushi is stepping into a world of stillness and understated luxury. Our architecture celebrates minimalism, using warm crimson light to craft an intimate Omakase space where time seems to stand still so you can savor every flavor.

items.name: Bluefin Tuna Nigiri
items.desc: Premium bluefin tuna over Koshihikari rice

items.name: Uni Roll
items.desc: Fresh Hokkaido sea urchin, premium nori seaweed

items.name: Dragon Roll
items.desc: Grilled unagi eel, avocado, signature teriyaki sauce

items.name: Wagyu Beef Tataki
items.desc: Lightly seared A5 wagyu beef with ponzu sauce

items.quote: Crimson Sushi isn't just a restaurant, it's a cultural journey. The precision in every cut of fish is rare to find in Vietnam.
items.name: Nguyen Hoang Nam

items.quote: A minimalist space that still feels immensely luxurious. The Omakase experience here truly rivals international standards.
items.name: Gourmet Magazine

items.quote: A perfect blend of fresh imported ingredients and the chef's masterful hands, creating an unforgettable flavor.
items.name: Elena Truong

contact.title: Find Us
contact.address: 123 Nghe Thuat Street, Ben Nghe Ward, District 1, Ho Chi Minh City

footer.description: Where the essence of Japanese gastronomy meets the heart of Saigon. We are committed to delivering an authentic, world-class sushi experience.
